chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 839 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA-12600/18 3. For hearing of MA-4449/18 4. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2019. Mr. Riazat Ali Sahar, advocate for petitioner. = Learned counsel for the petitioner by way of statement has filed certain documents, those are taken on record. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner the case for confirmation for regularization of the contract service of the petitioner is being delayed by the respondents for want of pendency of the instant petition and he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merit, if the respondents No. 2 and 3 are directed to proceed with the regularization of the services of the petitioner in terms of letter No.30066/11931-33 dated 31st September, 2019 issued by Director (HR & Admn) for D.G Director General (Medical Services) WAPDA Teaching Hospital Complex Lahore. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to respondents No.2 and 3 to process with the regularization case of the petitioner in accordance with law, expeditiously (preferably within three months) by taking the direction which are contained by above referred letter into consideration. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
